design_philosophy.description: A fusion of agricultural warmth (organic textures, earth tones) and enterprise precision (Swiss grid, high data density). The interface must feel trustworthy to Indian officers while providing the speed required for emergency advisory.
design_philosophy.visual_style: Clean, high-contrast data surfaces on top of warm, subtle organic backgrounds.

usage_rules.headings: Use Manrope for all headings (h1-h6). Weight: SemiBold (600) or Bold (700). Tracking: tight (-0.02em).
usage_rules.body: Use Inter for all data tables, inputs, and long-form text. Weight: Regular (400) or Medium (500).
usage_rules.numbers: Use tabular-nums class for all data metrics and phone numbers to ensure alignment.

usage.primary: Main actions, active states, sidebar background.
usage.accent: AI/Voice indicators, active call pulsing effects.

buttons.style: Pill-shaped for primary actions, rounded-md for filters/secondary.

cards.style: Flat, high border contrast, no heavy shadows.
cards.classes: bg-card border border-border/60 shadow-sm hover:border-primary/20 transition-colors

visual_enhancers.textures: Use a subtle noise texture on the main background to reduce digital sterility.
visual_enhancers.glassmorphism: Use backdrop-blur-md for sticky headers and overlays.
visual_enhancers.borders: Use 1px borders everywhere. Avoid borderless cards in this data-heavy context.

assets.icons: Lucide React (default). Use stroke-width={1.5} for a refined look.

accessibility.contrast: Ensure all text meets WCAG AA. Use darker shades of green/gold for text on colored badges.
accessibility.focus: Visible focus rings on all interactive elements.
accessibility.aria: Use aria-labels for all icon-only buttons.

universal_guidelines: Do not use gradients for main backgrounds.
Ensure all interactive elements have data-testid attributes.
Prioritize Hindi-compatible font rendering (line-heights may need adjustment).
instructions_to_main_agent: You are building the frontend. Use the colors defined in 'variables' to update index.css. Use the layout principles to build the Dashboard shell. Use the image URLs provided for the login and hero sections. Ensure the 'Active Call' component uses the 'accent' color for the voice visualization.
